# Cognis Group | AI Consulting, Strategy & Agent Engineering

Last updated: 2026-05-29

> Cognis Group builds, deploys, and governs AI systems — agents, chatbots, workflows, governance frameworks, and workforce training. Lagos-headquartered, globally engaged.

## About

Cognis Group is a Lagos-headquartered AI consulting and engineering firm. We build, deploy, and govern AI systems for enterprises across Africa and globally. Every engagement leaves the organization permanently more capable — we do not sell dependency.

**Quod Tango Muto — What we touch, we change.**

## Core capabilities

Three practice areas (see https://cognis.group/our-services):

1. **AI Strategy & Advisory** — AI readiness assessments, use-case identification, and deployment roadmaps that move from strategy to measurable business impact. (https://cognis.group/our-services/ai-strategy-advisory)
2. **AI Agent & Automation Engineering** — Custom AI agents, copilots, and automation pipelines built for production: integrated, observable, and governed — built on your stack, governed by your rules. (https://cognis.group/our-services/ai-agent-automation-engineering)
3. **AI Training & Workforce Development** — Role-based AI literacy programmes for C-suite to frontline teams, covering capability, mindset, and governance discipline at scale. (https://cognis.group/our-services/ai-training-workforce-development)

AI governance and regulatory alignment (NDPA 2023, CBN guidance, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act) is built into every engagement as a design input, not a separate line item.

## Products

Beyond advisory, Cognis Group builds and operates its own software. Four products (see https://cognis.group/products):

1. **Cognis AI** (https://ai.cognis.group) — A workforce of specialised AI workers. Hire one for support, voice, knowledge, ops, or trade. Each worker is built for a single job, starts in shadow mode, earns autonomy through supervised promotion, and can be cancelled anytime. Priced per worker. Tagline: "Hire AI to do the work." Status: Live.
2. **MarketSage** (https://www.marketsage.africa) — Autonomous marketing and sales intelligence. Plans campaigns, runs them across channels, and turns activity into pipeline; composes into existing CRM and outreach. Tagline: "Marketing that thinks, acts, and converts." Status: Live.
3. **Migratio** (https://migratio.cognis.group) — The data-migration platform for banks, ministries, and regulated enterprises. Record-level reconciliation and audit trail, naming-normalisation built for African registries, signed cutover with zero-drift verification. Reconcile before cutover; pass the regulator's review on the first try. Status: Live.
4. **SPOG** — A new Cognis Group product, in development. Status: Coming soon.

## Where African context meets AI engineering

Our edge is deep African market knowledge combined with global AI engineering capability. International clients engaging with African operations get context no Western firm can authentically replicate. African enterprises get senior engineering without the overhead of remote Western consultancies.

We work remotely, on-site, and through hybrid engagement models.

## Our operating principles

- **We deploy, we don't theorize.** Every engagement leaves the organization permanently more capable.
- **We don't replace people with AI — we make people extraordinary with AI.**
- **Lagos-headquartered. Globally engaged. What we touch, we change.**

## Frequently asked

**What does Cognis Group actually do?** We build, deploy, and govern AI systems — agents, chatbots, workflows, governance frameworks, and training programmes — across three practice areas: AI Strategy & Advisory, AI Agent & Automation Engineering, and AI Training & Workforce Development. We also build and operate our own products: Cognis AI, MarketSage, and Migratio.

**Where is Cognis Group based?** Headquartered in Lagos, registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission. Sister entity in the United States.

**What industries do you serve?** Enterprises, government agencies, banks, telcos, and fintechs across Africa, plus international organizations operating in or expanding into Africa.

**How do you approach AI governance?** We build policy frameworks, audit structures, and compliance systems aligned with both NDPA/CBN guidance and global standards (ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act). We design governance before deployment, not after.

**How does a Lagos-based firm work with international clients?** Deep African market knowledge combined with global AI engineering. We work remotely, on-site, and through hybrid engagement models.

**What makes Cognis different?** We are an African firm by design, not a Western practice with an Africa strategy bolted on. Every engagement leaves the organization permanently more capable.
